about_item: NEXT-GEN GPS DOG TRACKER: The Fi Series 3+ collar is our most accurate and reliable smart collar—featuring 2x improved GPS performance from past devices to track your dog’s real-time location, nationwide, with no range limits using the Fi app. It’s the perfect Christmas dog collar for dog moms and dog dads.

ESCAPE ALERTS: Custom virtual fences use the Fi app to alert you the instant your dog leaves a safe zone. If your dog escapes, get real-time notifications from your GPS dog tracker every few seconds as your dog roams.

AI-POWERED HEALTH + BEHAVIOR TRACKING: The first smart dog tracking collar to detect activity, rest, barking, licking, scratching, eating, and drinking—giving you a complete picture of your dog’s well-being. Review all your dog’s health and behavior data right in the Fi app.

APPLE WATCH INTEGRATION + ANDROID & IPHONE COMPATIBLE: View live location, activity, and Lost Mode from your Apple Watch. Plus, ask the built-in AI Companion anything—from behavior questions to care tips from your smartphone. This dog tracker delivers personalized reminders for vet visits, vaccines, and more through the Fi app.

SMART VET RECORDS: Never lose track of your dog’s medical history. Add vet receipts, pet insurance, vaccine records, training certificates, and other important health documents in the Fi app to help organize, summarize, and store the documents—all in one place.

summary.text: Customers find the GPS collar works well for tracking their dogs' locations and activity levels, and appreciate its ease of setup and use. Moreover, the device provides peace of mind, with one customer noting it's particularly helpful when traveling. However, the accuracy and connectivity receive mixed reviews - while some find the GPS tracking very accurate, others report it's not great for walks, and while some say the battery life is amazing, others mention it drains rapidly. Additionally, opinions on value for money are divided, with some considering it worth the price while others find it overpriced.

insights.title: Functionality
insights.summary: Customers find that the GPS collar works great for tracking and appreciate the app that comes with it.

examples.snippet: Great product. Subscription is a little pricey but if he ever gets lost I would have given that much money to find him so really it's nothing....
It is a great collar and has helped us find our Husky when she escapes the yard. It does tend to give false escapes from time to time....
Works great. It shows us where she is and what she is doing. Resting, eating, drinking, who she is walking with and where. Jist a beautiful system.
...Quick notification time when they leave the safe zone. Works well, and the light at night is great for visibility if you have an explorer like we do!

insights.title: Tracking
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the collar's tracking capabilities, being able to monitor their dogs' steps, daily activity levels, and real-time location, allowing them to know where their pets are at all times.

examples.snippet: ...Not only is it a GPS, but it also tracks steps. This has been a great motivation tool to becoming more active. Highly recommend.
Quality material used for the cooler and tracking device; super easy to assemble and set up tracking. I love seeing the activity and nap time data....
...I ordered it immediately. Not only does Fi offer the best tracking I’ve ever seen (and I’ve used it), it also offers great info on sleep, steps and...
It does not track in real time, you have to manually initiate tracking plus it doesn’t stop dog from leaving the geo fencing....

insights.title: Ease of use
insights.summary: Customers find the dog collar easy to set up and use, with the app being straightforward to follow.

examples.snippet: ...I charge weekly and never gets below like 60% battery life. Easy to set up. Lost dog feature is amazing. Very happy with purchase.
Love the Fi GPS tracker for my dog. Easy to use and charge. When GPS loses a signal, Wifi connects and we're back on line. I'm satisfied.
...the app always running in the background on my phone - but it is really easy and quick to charge....
...App is easy to use. My dog likes to play in snow and rain and unit works fine. Battery life is good....

insights.title: Peace of mind
insights.summary: Customers appreciate the tracker's peace of mind feature, with one mentioning it provides confidence while traveling, and another noting it's comforting to know their pet's whereabouts.

examples.snippet: ...He’s a big ole 90 pound rescue puppy. This gives me such a peace of mind in case he gets loose but also lets me know how his energy level is and if...
...Overall the Fi collar gives me great peace of mind knowing my dog is safe and can be found in case of an emergency.
...Great collar and piece of mind.
...GPS tracker and zones are easy to install and track. Provides piece of mind to make sure our curious puppy does not leave us and if so we will...

insights.title: Accuracy
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the GPS tracker's accuracy, with some finding it very accurate, while others report that it isn't great, particularly during walks.

examples.snippet: Very easy to set up. The GPS maps and tracking are great and accurate. I also like the stats on his sleep patterns, eating habits and activity....
...My small complaint comes in the GPS accuracy....
...Setup was easy. User interface of the app is clear. The GPS tracking is accurate. Overall very high accuracy - no false positives or false negatives.
...What a caller should cost. I hooked it up, paid my fees. It is very inaccurate....

insights.title: Battery life
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the tracker's battery life, with some finding it amazing and staying charged well, while others report that it suffers and drains rapidly.

examples.snippet: The battery life is great and when it needs to charge its very convenient to just remove the whole collar and place on the base....
Best collar on market as far as weight size and battery life. I wish it would update location faster otherwise I would give it 5 stars.
...We are thrilled with our purchase. Only negatives are the battery does not last long when we leave him with the sitter if the sitter doesn’t...
I’ve been using for four months now. The battery life is good. Goes about a week at a time on a charge. And the app shows you the battery life....

insights.title: Value for money
insights.summary: Customers have mixed opinions about the value for money of the dog collar, with some finding it well worth the money and works well for the price, while others feel it's not worth the initial price.

examples.snippet: ...This collar is worth every penny. I did the research and it looks like this is the best one you could get. The collar is very heavy duty.
...I was never alerted when my dog left the safe zone. So this was a waste of money.
...I love this collar tracker. Worth the money. Hint buy another base for frequently visited spots to keep the battery life up....
...Works great if you have a lot of land. Works as it should its just a bit pricey but the 12month included subscription helps a lot with that.

insights.title: Connectivity
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the tracker's connectivity, with some reporting that it sometimes can't connect and interferes with auto connect to other devices, while others find it reliable.

examples.snippet: The item works quite well. I have problems with it disconnecting from my wifi, periodically. Other than that, it's really good equipment.
...There is somewhat of a social network built into the app where you can post and other like other pics of dogs and connect with other dog owners; but...
...The collar is good although the iPhone app seems to disconnect at time and reports a lost dog instead of being on a walk with someone....
...Restarting doesn't work. Ensuring the base reconnected to home wifi doesn't work. Swiping to refresh gps location doesn't work....

authors_reviews.title: Extremely important to keep ur dog alive
authors_reviews.text: I love how much this collar allows me to see if or when my dog moves and what kind of movement he does. Keeps track of where he has gone as well. If I can't keep track of him and he gets lost, I always find him! I love how it keeps asking if the location lines are true or not when we do walk outside of the boundary lines.
authors_reviews.author: Racquel Evans

authors_reviews.title: Much improved over series 2
authors_reviews.text: We had three series 2 fi collars for a few years. Generally had been quite happy with them and the features/price until two of the collars started to come undone while walking the our dogs. One deteriorated to the point it came loose 4 times on one walk at which point I removed the collars and.sropped using them completely. The problem is that the fi receiver fits in line with the collar so if the attachment comes.loose the collar is no.longer connected, and the dog is now without a leash and without a gps tracker.I found companies that created a pouch or other holder for the gps , that would fit around a normal collar. This meant the gps receive is no.longer a critical link. With that in mind I decided to try upgrading to a fi3 series collar.Initially I was going to upgrade my subscription with a credit , but it actually turned out cheaper and quicker to.get the collar from Amazon.The new collar arrived today , nicely packed and ready to go.Setup of the base and collar weren't too difficult. I did find it went better if you didn't put the collar on the base during setup until prompted later. Also, it took a while to connect to my wifi properly. Be patient and it eventually sorts itself out.Have yet to try the tracking outside my safe zone but two things I like already.The attachments to the gps receiver are metal not plastic, and there is a magnetic door that holds things shut. Feels must more robust , and harder to come apart accidentally. Instead of popping out vertically it has to slide out horizontally before it comes loose. I am a little more.comfortable with this design and may skip using the pouches that I planned to.Secondly the led is a little more active and makes itself a little easier to spot due to the motion, not just the pulsing led.Hoping the gps tracking works well when I go on a walk tomorrow. Seems to find the house ok.Curiously it did record 430 steps just setting up and holding the collar. I'm claiming those steps and eating a donut to compensate. :)One thing that surprised me. The blue collar has a pattern on one side and is plain on the other. For some reason the pattern is on the inside when worn and there appears to be no way to flip it over. Indeed the photos on first website show the same, so it appears deliberate. I would jave thought the pattern would look decent showing outwards but maybe that's just me.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Accurate and provides great information
authors_reviews.text: Very easy to set up. The GPS maps and tracking are great and accurate. I also like the stats on his sleep patterns, eating habits and activity. Would definitely recommend to my friends!
authors_reviews.author: Jesus E Sanchez

authors_reviews.title: Inaccurate GPS; not reliable for rural areas.
authors_reviews.text: I’ve been exceedingly hopeful about this product for a long time now. When it connects to GPS, it’s helpful for at least getting you in a general range. It does not accurately let you know when your pet has left the safe zone at all. It also does not pinpoint your dog’s location on GPS; it only shows a general location, so you could be 500 to 1000 feet apart, which is a very big distance if you’re in a forest or field without a clear line of sight. It can take 45 minutes to get a notification that your dog has left the safe zone, depending on when it picks it up on GPS. The battery does last a while, but nowhere near the three-month claim. It is sturdy and it does stay on, however. The point of the light I don’t quite understand because it’s not bright enough if you’re looking for them at night. I think it’s just a fancy added feature. The subscription part, where you can see all of the steps that they take, is not really a bonus, the way I purchased it. It was part of a package deal, so I’m not sure if I have to keep it yet. I certainly don’t plan to because it won’t be worth the money for what I’ve gotten out of the product.If you’re looking for something that is going to immediately tell you when the dog leaves, give you a small area, as in less than a third of an acre for a safe zone, and pick up GPS signals in rural areas, you’re going to need to spend a lot more money or find a better product that I may not have found. This is not meant for rural areas or anywhere that has gaps in GPS. You’ll just be hunting for your dog for hours, walking in circles, playing chase, hoping this thing actually leads you somewhere.
authors_reviews.author: Syndel

authors_reviews.title: Pretty good locator.
authors_reviews.text: Works pretty good aside from the minutes it takes to update. My biggest problem is that this is not a breakaway collar and my Izzy got caught up on an old bolt under an old van on the ranch. She was able to slip the collar but I wonder how long she was stuck. That makes me a bit leery of it. We are wooded with a large boat barn and shop down on the lower property. It took us a good hour to find it because location is a bit delayed. They play rough all day down there in the woods and I never worried about them getting caught up but now I do.
authors_reviews.author: Marianne

other_countries_reviews.title: NO COMPREN ESTE PRODUCTO
other_countries_reviews.text: Este producto no sirve fuera de estados unidos, gaste mucho dinero por él, pero la aplicación no tiene cobertura en mi país y trate de regresarlo, pero Amazon no pudo ayudarme y las paqueterías locales se lavaron las manos además de que por parte del vendedor no me proporcionaron un número de guía válido, desafortunadamente tuve que quedármelo, la peor experiencia de compra que he tenido, si eres de México u otro país NO COMPRES este producto!
other_countries_reviews.author: Jose Heredia
